channel.title: mcp Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the mcp codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: GraphCache Class — mcp Architecture
item.description: Architecture documentation for the GraphCache class in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.

item.description: Architecture documentation for the Server class in server.ts from the mcp codebase.

item.title: AnalysisTools Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: Functional tools that perform structural queries on the codebase graph to retrieve symbol context. Architectural overview of the AnalysisTools domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 6 source files.

item.title: GraphCache Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The data persistence and indexing layer that manages pre-computed code graphs and optimizes query speed. Architectural overview of the GraphCache domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: McpServer Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The core orchestration layer that implements the Model Context Protocol and manages tool registration and execution. Architectural overview of the McpServer domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 5 source files.

item.title: RepositoryUtilities Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: Low-level utilities for interacting with the local filesystem and VCS. Architectural overview of the RepositoryUtilities domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 4 source files.

item.title: Archiving — mcp Architecture
item.description: Manages repository zipping and .gitignore filtering Architecture documentation for the Archiving subdomain (part of RepositoryUtilities domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: CallGraph — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles BFS exploration of callers and callees Architecture documentation for the CallGraph subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Configuration — mcp Architecture
item.description: Manages server settings, timeouts, and API authentication Architecture documentation for the Configuration subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ErrorHandling — mcp Architecture
item.description: Converts network/API errors into structured MCP errors Architecture documentation for the ErrorHandling subdomain (part of RepositoryUtilities domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Eviction — mcp Architecture
item.description: Manages cache TTL and node count limits Architecture documentation for the Eviction subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Overview — mcp Architecture
item.description: Identifies hub functions and domain-level metrics Architecture documentation for the Overview subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SymbolSearch — mcp Architecture
item.description: Implements logic for Class.method and partial name matching Architecture documentation for the SymbolSearch subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ToolRegistry — mcp Architecture
item.description: Registers and exposes functions like symbol_context and explore_function Architecture documentation for the ToolRegistry subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Transport — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles standard input/output communication for the MCP protocol Architecture documentation for the Transport subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: VCS — mcp Architecture
item.description: Interacts with Git to resolve commit hashes and repo names Architecture documentation for the VCS subdomain (part of RepositoryUtilities domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
